Best Regional Universities South Rankings

Best Regional Universities South Rankings

Regional Universities offer a full range of undergraduate programs and some master's programs but few doctoral programs. These rankings are split into four regions: North, South, Midwest and West. Read the methodology »

Summary

Here are the best universities in the South

  • The Citadel, the Military College of South Carolina
  • Rollins College
  • Appalachian State University
  • Berry College
  • Embry-Riddle Aeronautical University-Daytona Beach
  • Christopher Newport University
  • Stetson University
  • Savannah College of Art and Design
  • College of Charleston
See The Full Rankings
